summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KULJADEED e-commerce store. Major improvement from previous iteration - cart sheet opening issue has been FIXED. Backend APIs working well (10/13 tests passed). Most frontend features functional including admin dashboard, coupons, wishlist, and search. CRITICAL: Language toggle functionality still completely missing despite bilingual requirement.

minor_issues.issue: Network timeout during invalid login test
minor_issues.impact: Test reliability issue, not functional issue

minor_issues.issue: Network timeout during unauthorized access test
minor_issues.impact: Test reliability issue, not functional issue

ui_bugs.issue: Language toggle functionality completely missing - no globe icons or language switching found. Critical for bilingual (Arabic/English) store requirement
Add to Wishlist button not found on product detail pages
Cart count indicator not visible after adding items to cart

integration_issues.issue: No language toggle functionality implemented - app should support Arabic/English with RTL direction switching

passed_tests: Homepage loads with KULJADEED branding and featured products
Products page navigation and display working
Product search functionality working correctly
Add to cart functionality working
Cart sheet opens correctly (FIXED from previous iteration)
Coupon input field available in cart
WELCOME10 coupon application working
Admin login flow works with admin@store.com / Admin123!
Admin dashboard accessible with all statistics
Admin products tab with add/edit/delete functionality
Admin orders tab accessible
Admin coupons tab with WELCOME10 coupon visible
Add coupon functionality available in admin
Wishlist page accessible and displays empty state correctly
Backend categories API working
Backend products API working (search, featured, detail)
Backend user registration and login working
Backend admin authentication and stats working
Backend cart operations working
Backend coupon validation working
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Implement missing language toggle functionality for bilingual (Arabic/English) support with RTL direction switching. This is a core requirement for the KULJADEED store. MEDIUM: Add wishlist button to product detail pages. The cart sheet opening issue from previous iteration has been successfully resolved.
